name: Zhejiang Jiaxin Silk Corp., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Jiaxin Silk Corp., Ltd. manufactures and sells silk fabrics and garments, and other silk-related products. It is involved in cocoon purchasing and drying, throwing, fabric manufacturing, and printing and dyeing, as well as the manufacture and export of garments primarily under the brand names of BCBG, Max Studio, Michael Kors, UESS, Armani Exchange, Mac & Jac, Marmaxx, Buffalo, Massimo Dutti, Zara, Max & Co., Bimba & Lola, French Connection, Lindex, Kookai, Marc Jacobs, Cavalli, Trussardi, etc. in Europe, the United States, Japan, and internationally. The company is based in Jiaxing, China.
